propositions: The completion-verifier FAIL verdict surfaces unmet criteria piecemeal, requiring multiple remediation rounds instead of one.
The prompt must require exhaustive per-criterion evaluation emitting one finding per unmet criterion, treating a subset-only verdict as incomplete.
A new deterministic scorer enumerates_all_unmet_criteria must be implemented and registered so it scores 1.0 only when each expected unmet criterion matches a distinct finding.
An eval case CV-two-unmet-criteria with two independent AC gaps proves the prompt emits both findings via the external eval run.
A FakeRunner unit test must assert a multi-finding FAIL verdict survives reconcile_verdict and the close path with all findings intact.
reconcile_verdict and close-path logic must remain byte-unchanged with no reconciliation or threshold edits.
